expectations.text: Uses pypdf PdfWriter or PdfMerger (not deprecated PyPDF2)
expectations.evidence: Uses 'from pypdf import PdfWriter, PdfReader'. Explicitly notes 'not PyPDF2'

expectations.text: Writes a single merged output file
References the correct library methods from the skill
expectations.evidence: Uses skill's exact pattern. Also mentions qpdf command-line alternative from skill
